description: A simple Italian salad built from sliced fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and basil, usually finished with olive oil and salt. Some versions also use balsamic glaze, although the classic form is very minimal.
preparation_steps: Arrange them in alternating layers or overlapping slices.
Drizzle with olive oil and season lightly before serving.

health_advice.benefits: Provides fresh produce, calcium, and protein in a simple dish with minimal processing.
health_advice.risks: Calories and saturated fat can rise with large amounts of cheese or oil.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use ripe tomatoes and moderate olive oil so the dish stays light and balanced.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional caprese is naturally gluten-free but not vegan because of mozzarella.
